UPDATE time_records
            SET status=?, end_action=?, end_timestamp=?, end_date=?, end_time=?,
                work_hours=?, remark=?, group_key=?, is_group_work=?, updated_at=?
            WHERE id=? AND (end_timestamp IS NULL OR TRIM(COALESCE(end_timestamp,''))='')
